ai_prompt_social_invitation_default: Write a social invitation title and welcoming message suited to the occasion and venue.
favorite_places_app_venues_hint: Pick from venues listed on DineBuddies
guest_post_prompt: Sign in to share a post with the community.
invitations_screen_subtitle: Discover open invites nearby or start your own.
notification_invite_unavailable: This invitation is no longer available.
private_ai_all_fields_required: Fill in the date, time, location, and message before using AI.
private_ai_description_missing: Add a short description or use AI to draft your message first.
private_ai_fields_applied: AI suggestions applied — review before sending.
private_ai_fields_empty: Nothing to apply yet — generate a draft with AI first.
private_ai_schedule_venue_required: Set the date, time, and location first — then AI can draft your message.
private_ai_text_fields_hint: Use AI above to draft the title and message, or write them yourself.
private_camera_short_hint: Record a short video for your invite
private_card_show_content_title: Off: date and place only on the card. On: show title, message, and profile photo.
private_card_theme_color_hint: One color for the frame and all text. Plain — no shadow on text.
private_invitee_not_available: This member is not available for private invites.
private_no_available_invitees: No one you follow is open to private invites. Follow members who accept private invites.
private_pick_date_create_hint: Only members who accept private invites appear here (consumer accounts only).
private_pick_date_preview: Choose who you are inviting below (optional for external link).
profile_gallery_hint: Add up to 3 portrait photos (9:16). Tap the star to choose which one appears in Discover & the member list.
social_invitation_access_denied: You do not have access to this invitation.
social_invitation_blocked_host: You cannot view invitations from this person.
